examples: General Sachet is ordered to oversee such executions.
Assembly supervisors oversee workers who put together products by using power tools or other dangerous equipment.
Carpenter supervisors oversee carpentry work on a specified project to ensure that workers are on schedule and executing plans accordingly.
Simon Hart, a former director of social services in north-east England, is to oversee improvements.
The next president of Serbia and the current, rather divided government, will oversee that process.
